steps.title: Interpret the percentage relationship
steps.content:
If 25% of the original marbles were removed, then 75% of the original remained. Since 300 marbles remained, we know:
$$0.75 \times \text{original} = 300$$

steps.title: Find 25% removed using proportions
steps.content:
We don't need to solve for the original. Instead, note that 25 is $\frac{1}{3}$ of 75 (since $\frac{25}{75} = \frac{1}{3}$).

This means the marbles removed equal $\frac{1}{3}$ of the marbles remaining:
$$\text{Removed} = \frac{1}{3} \times 300 = 100$$
That matches Choice B — $100$.
